hero.badge: Available for Global Remote · US/EU Time Zones
hero.description: I build scalable, high-performance applications with a focus on exceptional user experiences. Based in Cape Town — working with the world.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Building at scale, from Cape Town to the world
about.bio: Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience architecting high-performance frontend systems and full stack applications. Currently leading frontend development at Solink, serving 10,000+ daily users. Previously at Aerobotics, building React Native applications used by 50,000+ farmers across Africa.
about.bio2: I'm passionate about clean architecture, developer experience, and building products that genuinely make an impact. Open to exciting global remote opportunities.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies I use to build great products

projects.title: Key Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected work demonstrating my engineering capabilities
projects.p1_desc: Architected a complete fullstack application with real-time collaboration, file uploads, and advanced user management. Features JWT authentication, live WebSocket synchronization, drag-drop uploads, and image processing.
projects.p2_desc: Led development of a white-label OMS used by 15+ enterprise clients with fully custom branding from a single codebase. Achieved 60% faster client onboarding and 40% reduction in UI-related support tickets.
projects.p3_desc: Built and maintained a hybrid mobile app for farm management and satellite data visualization, serving 50,000+ active users with real-time monitoring capabilities and geospatial data pipelines handling 2TB+ monthly.
projects.p4_desc: Built a complete booking and payment system for a natural hair consultation business. Customers pick a date and time, pay via PayFast (R600), and automatically receive a confirmation email, Google Calendar invite, and Google Meet link — all saved to a Supabase database in real time.
